 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","title":"Reduce flakiness in production Playwright smoke tests","description":"Playwright production smoke tests used waitForLoadState("networkidle") directly, which can be flaky on pages with long-lived background requests (analytics, etc). Add a helper that waits for domcontentloaded and then attempts networkidle with a short timeout, without failing if the page never becomes fully idle.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.185815Z","updated_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","closed_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:46.273323Z","close_reason":"Implemented waitForPageSettled helper and replaced strict networkidle waits in production smoke tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zumu","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-dvt.6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-25T06:26:18.187139Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","title":"TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard","description":"# TASK: Add final completion certificate to onboard

## Context
When user completes all 9 lessons, show a special completion screen.

## Proposed Screen
```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│                                                             │
│  🏆 ACFS ONBOARDING COMPLETE!                               │
│                                                             │
│  Congratulations! You've completed all 9 lessons.           │
│                                                             │
│  You're now ready to:                                       │
│  • Launch AI agents with cc, cod, gmi                       │
│  • Manage sessions with ntm                                 │
│  • Search code with rg                                      │
│  • Use the full flywheel workflow                           │
│                                                             │
│  Next steps:                                                │
│  • Run 'acfs info' for quick reference                      │
│  • Run 'acfs cheatsheet' for all commands                   │
│  • Start a project with 'ntm new myproject && cc'           │
│                                                             │
│  Completed: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')                       │
│                                                             │
│  Happy coding! 🚀                                            │
│                                                             │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

## Implementation

### Store Completion Timestamp
```bash
# In onboard_progress.json
{
  "completed_lessons": [0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8],
  "completed_at": "2025-01-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### Trigger Condition
Show when:
- User just completed lesson 8 (last)
- OR user runs `onboard` when all lessons complete

### Re-access
User can re-run `onboard` to see certificate again.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Certificate shown on final completion
- [ ] Completion timestamp stored
- [ ] Shows next steps recommendations
- [ ] Accessible by running onboard again
- [ ] Celebration emoji/styling","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T19:59:54.304099Z","updated_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","closed_at":"2025-12-22T20:35:03.037145Z","close_reason":"View Certificate menu option added to onboard. Shows trophy option when all 9 lessons complete.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-zwg3","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kyhv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T20:00:16.782605Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-12kj","title":"Deep exploration: WA (WezTerm Automata)","description":"## Goal
Perform deep exploration of WA (Web Agent / WebView Automation) and revise its description on the flywheel/TLDR pages with comprehensive testing.

## Phase 0: Pre-flight Verification (CRITICAL)

### 0.1 Tool Existence Check
```bash
# Verify WA installation (check for common web automation paths)
[[ -d /dp/web_agent ]] && echo "PASS: wa repo exists" || echo "INFO: wa repo path differs"
command -v wa &>/dev/null && echo "PASS: wa command available" || echo "INFO: wa not in PATH"

# Check browser automation dependencies
command -v playwright &>/dev/null && echo "INFO: playwright available" || echo "INFO: playwright not installed"
command -v chromium &>/dev/null && echo "INFO: chromium available" || echo "INFO: chromium not installed"
```

### 0.2 Content Snapshot (BEFORE State)
```bash
SNAPSHOT_DIR=/tmp/wa-exploration-snapshots-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
mkdir -p $SNAPSHOT_DIR
cp apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/flywheel.ts.before
cp apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts $SNAPSHOT_DIR/tldr-content.ts.before
echo "Snapshots saved to $SNAPSHOT_DIR"
```

### 0.3 TypeScript Interface Reference
Content must match FlywheelTool interface:
- id, name, tagline, description, deepDescription
- features[], cliCommands[], connectsTo[]
- integrationLevel, category, status

## Phase 1: Research (GATHER CONTEXT)

### 1.1 Primary Documentation
- Find WA repo and read README
- Check for browser automation docs, screenshot capabilities

### 1.2 Code Investigation
- Launch code investigation agent to understand:
  - Browser automation mechanism (Playwright? Puppeteer?)
  - Screenshot capture capabilities
  - Form filling and interaction
  - Integration with Claude chrome extension
  - Headless vs headed mode

### 1.3 CLI Command Verification
```bash
# Verify each documented command works
wa --help 2>&1 | head -20 || echo "No wa command"
# Check for alternative names
browser-agent --help 2>&1 | head -10 || echo "No browser-agent"
```

### 1.4 External Context Search
- `/xf search 'web agent OR browser automation OR playwright'` - Twitter archive
- `cass search 'wa browser screenshot' --robot --limit 10` - Past sessions

### 1.5 Project State Review
- Find WA repo location
- Review recent commits

## Phase 2: Analysis (SYNTHESIZE UNDERSTANDING)

### 2.1 Core Capabilities Verification
Document findings for each area:
- [ ] Browser automation engine
- [ ] Screenshot capabilities
- [ ] Form interaction
- [ ] Claude extension integration
- [ ] Headless operation

### 2.2 Synergy Verification
Cross-reference these tools actually integrate:
- [ ] claude-chrome - Chrome extension
- [ ] mail - screenshot sharing
- [ ] ntm - coordinated browser tasks

### 2.3 Capability Verification
```bash
# Check for playwright installation
npx playwright --version 2>/dev/null || echo "playwright not installed"

# Check for browser binaries
ls ~/.cache/ms-playwright/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No cached browsers"
```

## Phase 3: Revision (UPDATE DESCRIPTIONS)

### 3.1 Update apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts
Update wa entry with VERIFIED information:
- `tagline`: Browser automation
- `description`: Web interaction capabilities
- `deepDescription`: How automation works
- `features`: Verified capabilities
- `cliCommands`: Only commands that actually work
- `connectsTo`: Only verified integrations

### 3.2 Update apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
Update TldrFlywheelTool entry with:
- `briefDescription`: Technical summary
- `bulletPoints`: Verified capabilities
- `synergyExamples`: Working integration examples

## Phase 4: Testing (VERIFY CHANGES)

### 4.1 TypeScript Compilation
```bash
cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20
```

### 4.2 Unit Tests
```bash
# Test wa entry structure
node -e "
const { flywheelTools } = require('./lib/flywheel');
const wa = flywheelTools.find(t => t.id === 'wa');
console.log('Testing wa entry...');
console.assert(wa, 'wa entry exists');
console.assert(wa.features?.length > 0, 'has features');
console.log('All assertions passed');
"
```

### 4.3 E2E Test: Browser Automation (Safe Mode)
```bash
#\!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
LOG=/tmp/wa-e2e-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log

echo "=== WA E2E Test ===" | tee $LOG
echo "Started: $(date)" | tee -a $LOG

# Test 1: Help/availability
echo "Test 1: Help check..." | tee -a $LOG
wa --help 2>&1 | head -10 | tee -a $LOG || echo "wa not available"

# Test 2: Screenshot capability
echo "Test 2: Screenshot help..." | tee -a $LOG
wa screenshot --help 2>&1 | head -5 | tee -a $LOG || echo "No screenshot command"

echo "=== All Tests Passed ===" | tee -a $LOG
echo "Log: $LOG"
```

### 4.4 Content Diff Verification
```bash
echo "=== Changes Made ==="
diff $SNAPSHOT_DIR/flywheel.ts.before apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts || true
diff $SNAPSHOT_DIR/tldr-content.ts.before apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts || true
```

## Phase 5: Completion (FINALIZE)

### 5.1 Rollback Procedure (if tests fail)
```bash
cp $SNAPSHOT_DIR/flywheel.ts.before apps/web/lib/flywheel.ts
cp $SNAPSHOT_DIR/tldr-content.ts.before apps/web/lib/tldr-content.ts
echo "Rolled back to pre-exploration state"
```

### 5.2 Sync Changes
```bash
br update bd-12kj --status done
br sync --flush-only
```

### 5.3 Final Verification
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] Browser capabilities documented correctly
- [ ] No broken links or references","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-26T20:02:06.153300827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:38:10.013400309Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T03:38:10.013370132Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
